title: Attributes & Methods
description: Add data and behavior to classes.

slides.title: Adding Behavior 🔧
slides.content:
# Instance Methods

Methods are functions inside a class:

```python
class Dog:
    def bark(self):
        print("Woof!")
```

First parameter is always `self`!

slides.title: Methods in Action 💻

quizData.question: What's the first parameter of instance methods?
quizData.explanation: Instance methods always have 'self' as their first parameter!

slides.title: Methods with Parameters 📥
Method Parameters 💻

quizData.question: Can methods modify object attributes?
quizData.explanation: Methods can access and modify attributes using self!

slides.title: Methods Returning Values 📤
slides.content:
# Return Values

```python
class Rectangle:
    def area(self):
        return self.width * self.height
```

Methods can return values just like functions!

slides.title: Return Values 💻
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Method Naming

* Use verbs: `calculate_total()`, `get_name()`
* Be descriptive: `update_balance()` not `ub()`
* Use snake_case: `my_method()` not `myMethod()`

quizData.question: How do you call an object's method?
quizData.explanation: Use dot notation: object.method() calls the method on that object!
